name: Plate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the fat into the flour and add the other dry ingredients.
2. Beat the eggs well and add to the mixture.
3. Add enough milk to keep the mixture soft.
4. Place in a shallow, greased and floured tin.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F or Mark 4) for 20 minutes.
6. Lower the temperature to 275°F or Mark 3 and continue baking for 40 minutes.
